_comment: Editorial seed list of known-good skills per role + facet. Bypasses discovery entirely — they're always considered for compose.py's facet picks. The user can append their own picks (mark added_by_user: true). Keep entries lean: repo identifier + role + facet only; everything else is computed at runtime.
_format_doc: Each entry: {"repo": "owner/repo", "added_by_user": bool, "why": "<one-line rationale>"}. The 'why' string surfaces in the proposal as the rationale.

spec_audit.why: design audit & critique skill from a former Google design lead — high signal for spec-stage review
design engineering skill from emilkowalski (Sonner, Vaul, etc.) — invisible details, hover/focus states, micro-interactions

implementation.why: baseline-ui + component patterns from ibelick — design-token enforcement, layout primitives
vercel-labs canonical skills bundle — React/Next best practices for design implementations

polish.why: the impeccable skill also covers polish-stage review
emilkowalski's skill is specifically about polish-level details

react_perf.why: vercel-labs ships react/next best-practices skills authored by the Next core team
